series_metadata.series_description: County Child Support Enforcement Agency agreements with government and non-government providers for child support services that are reviewed by Fiscal Administration to ensure compliance with the Child Support Program, and rejected or accepted under those guidelines. The agreements can run from 3 months to 1 year. Providers agree to deliver services to establish and enforce child support obligations, collect support, and cooperate with other states to enforce e.g. genetic testing, credit checks, paternity searches, and legal services through the court system. The agreements are assembled and submitted in a format prescribed in OAC

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office , store in record's center 5 years ; Electronic: 7 years
